---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve the project
title: "[FEATURE] : "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 📝 Describe the Feature
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->


## 🎯 Use Case
<!-- Explain the use case and why this feature would be useful -->


## 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- How do you envision this feature working? -->


## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered? -->


## 🎨 Mockups or Examples
<!-- Please provide mockups, screenshots, links, or examples of similar features elsewhere -->


## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's vision (minimal, lightweight, vanilla JS)
- [ ] This wouldn't add external dependencies
- [ ] This maintains the retro macOS aesthetic
- [ ] This improves user experience or functionality
- [ ] I have checked existing issues and this is not a duplicate

## 📋 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, background, or observations here -->

---

**Note**: Please keep in mind that this project prioritizes:
- ✅ Simplicity and minimal code
- ✅ Zero external dependencies
- ✅ Pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript
- ✅ Lightweight and fast performance
- ✅ Retro macOS design language

If your feature aligns with these principles, we're excited to hear about it!
